nodes.long_description:
VRFS is a community-driven soccer (football) simulator focused on realistic physics and competitive multiplayer.

Main features of VRFS:

PHYSICS SIMULATION: Perform almost any trick—from balancing the ball on your foot to executing curved power shots or long passes. The ball’s trajectory is fully determined by the physics engine.

COMPETITIVE MULTIPLAYER: Experience instantaneous ball-touch response. For example, you can finish powerful crosses as fast as in real soccer.

COMFORT: Move with thumbsticks and play seated or standing. No intense hand motions are required.

NO PAY-TO-WIN: Skill determines success. No one can buy “stronger kicks” or “faster boots.” Practice leads to improvement.

FREE FOR ALL: Full access without any mandatory purchases. Optional cool gear is available to support further development.

Please note, VRFS is still in development, with upcoming physics and scenery enhancements. We welcome your suggestions for improvements.
nodes.short_description:
VRFS is a community-driven soccer (football) simulator focused on realistic physics and competitive multiplayer.

Main features of VRFS:
- Realistic physics
- Competitive multiplayer
- Comfortable controls
- No pay-to-win mechanics
- Free for all

Please note, VRFS is still in development, with upcoming physics and scenery enhancements. We welcome your suggestions for improvements.

nodes.long_description:
VRFS is a community-driven football simulator with focus on realistic physics and competitive online multiplayer.

Here are the main features of VRFS:

FOOTBALL PHYSICS SIMULATION: A player can perform almost any trick from balancing the ball on the tip of the foot to executing curved power shots and long passes. The ball's trajectory is solely determined by physics engine. 

COMPETITIVE ONLINE MODE: The multiplayer architecture allows for an immediate response when a player touches the ball. For example, it is possible to finish a powerful cross at the same speed as in real football, even if the connection is not perfect.

COMFORT: Players move around using thumbsticks and can play in a seated or standing position. No intense hand movement is required.

NO PAY-TO-WIN in VRFS: only skills matter. No one can buy "stronger kicks" or "faster boots." Keep practicing, and you'll feel how you improve.

FREE FOR ALL: Players have full access to the game with no need to purchase anything. However, if you wish, you will be able to buy cool equipment in the store, thus supporting the further development of this project (paid equipment coming soon)

Please, bear in mind that VRFS is still in development, including upcoming upgrades to the physics and scenery. We'd appreciate your suggestions regarding any enhancements.
nodes.short_description:
VRFS is a community-driven football simulator with focus on realistic physics and competitive online multiplayer.

Here are the main features of VRFS:
- Realistic football physics
- Competitive online mode
- Comfortable controls
- No pay-to-win mechanics
- Free for all

Please, bear in mind that VRFS is still in development, including upcoming upgrades to the physics and scenery. We'd appreciate your suggestions regarding any enhancements.

nodes.change_log:
# UPDATE 0.4.7

## Weather Settings
Introducing weather physics with snow, rain, and wind. You can enable any weather on any map in private, solo, and practice modes. However only some of the maps allow weather in public matches. Weather affects ball physics such as drag on the field. Weather is synced for all players in the same lobby and is set by the lobby creator.

## New Starting Arena
Explore the next-gen starting stadium, which will evolve with crowds and additional features in the future. It’s also available in multiplayer.

## Replays Auto Highlights
Enable automatic goal highlights when watching replays.

## New 1v1 Elo Interface
Check out the overall 1v1 Elo chart and use the new "Find Opponent" button for quick matches. 

## Referee Tools
Use marking spray, yellow cards, and red cards. Press (A) to switch tools when in the ref mode. 

## New Scoreboards Designs
Choose from various scoreboard designs for custom arenas.

## Vote Kick
Now available in public lobbies.

## Camera Device Follow Mode
New interface, better performance, and the "Follow Me" mode for the camera device.

## Scoreboards On Custom Arena Goals
Display goal counters on custom arena goals (press settings on the goal when editing your arena).

## Wind Physics Test Bundle
Includes 2 special effect balls created during weather physics development.

## Other
Store Credits item for custom arenas, performance optimizations, updated tutorial, fixed known bugs. 

## Free Collectible 2025 Ball
Find it in the store at the new starting stadium. It will be removed after New Year’s.
